list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.activity FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m ORDER BY 1;

list.name: vo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.vo FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: site
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT m.site FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) ORDER BY 1;

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.vo) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE m.activity = 'grid' AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.vo) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE m.activity = 'cloud' AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.vo) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE m.activity = 'network' AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT_WS('::', m.vo, m.activity, m.site)) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT SUM(COALESCE(m.records,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring}));

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(p.probe_ts, $__interval), p.service_name AS metric, ROUND((100.0 * AVG(CASE WHEN p.ok THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END))::numeric, 2) AS value FROM monitoring.service_health_probe p WHERE $__timeFilter(p.probe_ts) AND p.service_name IN ('publication-api-a','publication-api-b','cim-transform','kpi-service','sql-adapter','grafana-proxy') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (p.service_name) p.service_name, p.probe_ts, p.ok, p.status_code, p.latency_ms, p.target, p.detail FROM monitoring.service_health_probe p WHERE p.service_name IN ('publication-api-a','publication-api-b','cim-transform','kpi-service','sql-adapter','grafana-proxy') ORDER BY p.service_name, p.probe_ts DESC;

SELECT m.bucket_15m AS time, m.activity AS metric, SUM(COALESCE(m.records,0)) AS value FROM monitoring.mv_fact_site_event_15m m WHERE $__timeFilter(m.bucket_15m) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR m.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR m.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR m.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;

SELECT r.vo, r.site, r.activity, SUM(COALESCE(r.records,0)) AS records, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(r.energy_wh,0))::numeric,3) AS energy_wh, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(r.cfp_g,0))::numeric,3) AS cfp_g FROM monitoring.v_reporting_record_listing r WHERE $__timeFilter(r.time_bucket) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR r.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR r.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR r.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1,2,3 ORDER BY records DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT r.activity, COUNT(*) AS resources, SUM(COALESCE(r.total_records,0)) AS total_records, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(r.energy_wh,0))::numeric,3) AS energy_wh, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(r.cfp_g,0))::numeric,3) AS cfp_g, ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(r.continuity_pct,0))::numeric,2) AS avg_continuity_pct FROM monitoring.v_reporting_resource_listing r WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR r.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR r.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR r.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total_records DESC;

SELECT r.vo, r.activity, r.site, r.country, r.active_since, r.last_seen, r.span_months, r.continuity_pct, r.metrics_reported, r.total_records, r.energy_wh, r.cfp_g, r.volume_of_data_bytes, r.source_db_presence FROM monitoring.v_reporting_resource_listing r WHERE ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR r.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR r.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR r.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) ORDER BY r.energy_wh DESC, r.total_records DESC;

SELECT r.time_bucket, r.vo, r.activity, r.site, r.records, r.energy_wh, r.cfp_g, r.work, r.ncores FROM monitoring.v_reporting_record_listing r WHERE $__timeFilter(r.time_bucket) AND ('${activity:text}' IN ('All','$__all','%') OR r.activity = '${activity:text}') AND ('$__all' IN (${vo:sqlstring}) OR r.vo IN (${vo:sqlstring})) AND ('$__all' IN (${site:sqlstring}) OR r.site IN (${site:sqlstring})) ORDER BY r.time_bucket DESC, r.energy_wh DESC LIMIT 500;
